author: oikeya
description: Import Raindrop.io bookmarks as AI-friendly reference notes without storing full page content. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Import Raindrop.io bookmarks as AI-friendly reference notes without storing full page content.

name: RefRaindrop

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* More stabilities 0629 by @oikeya in https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/pull/3
* More Stabilities 0630 by @oikeya in https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/pull/4

  * Bugfix AI index creation started but stopped midway.
  * Guard access for raindrop API infinity.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/compare/0.1.1...0.1.2
releases.name: RefRaindrop 0.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Support access interval (Guard for burst access) by @oikeya in https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/pull/1
* Removed the ai_summarize_ignore file and moved it into the settings instead. by @oikeya in https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/pull/2

## New Contributors
* @oikeya made their first contribution in https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oikeya/obsidian-ref-raindrop/compare/0.1.0...0.1.1

- Import Raindrop.io bookmarks
- Create AI-friendly reference notes
- Preserve metadata without storing full page content
